---
title: "CI tree builder"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{CI tree builder}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r}
library(ineqTrees)
```

<!-- WARNING - This vignette is generated by {fusen} from dev/ci_tree_builder.Rmd: do not edit by hand -->



<!--
 Source of truth for one fusen feature area. Run the inflate chunk at the bottom after editing.
-->

# Greedy tree controls and recursive builder
